admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.description: Configure grading settings and register new problems.
admin.gradingSettingsDesc: Adjust thresholds and duplicate detection behavior.
admin.similarityHint: Problems above this score trigger duplicate warning.
admin.confidenceHint: LLM responses below this confidence trigger cross-verification.
admin.duplicateHint: Warn shows advisory; Block prevents registration entirely.
admin.problemRegistrationDesc: Register new problems with LaTeX content and grading metadata.

problemsPage.title: Problems Management
problemsPage.description: Create, edit, and manage math problems

analysisComparison.naiveConclusion: Naive analysis would say: "Weak in {count} units".
analysisComparison.naiveNoRootCause: No root cause identified. Student must study {count} separate units independently.
analysisComparison.graphragConclusion: GraphRAG analysis: Root causes are {rootCount} concepts — fix them to resolve all {affectedCount} affected units.
analysisComparison.graphragBenefit: Fix {rootCount} core concepts, resolve all {affectedCount} units. Efficient and targeted remediation.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Configure grading and duplicate detection settings

studentProblems.title: Problems
studentProblems.description: Browse available math problems and submit your answers
studentProblems.noProblems: No problems available yet. Check back later!

studentProblemDetail.uploadLabel: Or upload an image of your work
studentProblemDetail.ocrFailed: OCR failed. Please try again or type your answer manually.
studentProblemDetail.submitFailed: Failed to submit. Please try again.

studentDiagnosis.title: My Diagnosis
studentDiagnosis.description: View your learning analysis and recommendations
studentDiagnosis.noProfile: No student profile linked to your account. Contact your teacher.
studentDiagnosis.loraDescription: AI-powered handwriting analysis to identify common mistakes in your written math work. This feature uses LoRA fine-tuned models to analyze your handwriting patterns.

grading.title: Grading View
grading.description: Submit student answers for intent-based grading.
grading.gradeSubmissionDesc: Select a problem and enter the student's answer to grade.
grading.gradingResultDesc: Verdict, engine used, and detailed reasoning.
grading.noResultHint: Submit a problem and answer to see the result here.
grading.intentBasedExamplesDesc: The same answer can be correct or wrong depending on the problem's intent.
grading.example1Hint: Expected form: factored. Answer is not in factored form.
grading.example2Hint: No expected form. Mathematically equivalent — accepted.
grading.example3Hint: Expected form: numeric. Must simplify to 5.

students.title: Students
students.description: View student profiles and access diagnosis dashboards.
students.studentListDesc: Click a student to view their diagnosis dashboard and learning path.

studentDetail.rootCauseDesc: Completing the square (mastery: 0.30) is the root cause behind failures in 3 different units: Quadratic Inequalities, Quadratic Functions, and Circle Equations.
studentDetail.conceptFrequencyDesc: Concepts appearing most in wrong answers.
studentDetail.rootCauseTracingDesc: Prerequisite graph backtracking reveals the true root cause.
studentDetail.naiveAnalysis: Naive analysis would say: "Weak in 3 units".
studentDetail.graphragAnalysis: GraphRAG analysis: Root cause is "Completing the Square" — fix one concept, resolve all three units.
studentDetail.learningStep3Desc: Apply completing the square to find vertex
studentDetail.learningStep4Desc: Use completing the square to derive standard form
studentDetail.practice4: Write x²+y²-4x+6y=3 in standard circle form

benchmark.title: Benchmark Dashboard
benchmark.description: LLM accuracy matrix, model recommendations, and cross-verification results.
benchmark.accuracyMatrixDesc: Accuracy (%) of each LLM across 6 math subjects. Mock data — will be replaced with real benchmark results.
benchmark.optimalModelPerSubjectDesc: Best-performing LLM for each math subject.

problemDetail.weightExplanation: Weights indicate how strongly each concept contributes to this problem's identity. Higher weights mean greater emphasis in similarity matching.
problemDetail.whyWeightsMatter: Problems with similar weighted concept distributions score higher in cosine similarity. Different weight emphasis on the same concepts produces different scores.

lora.title: LoRA Fine-Tuning Results
lora.description: Gemini handwriting OCR baseline vs LoRA fine-tuned performance.
lora.improvementBanner: Accuracy improvement will be shown after benchmark completes
lora.costFeasibilityDesc: Per-student fine-tuning metrics and scalability assessment.
lora.scalingPlaceholder: Scaling analysis will be populated after LoRA fine-tuning experiments complete.
lora.recommendationDesc: Whether to proceed with per-student LoRA fine-tuning for production.
lora.recommendationText: Recommendation will be generated after all experiments are complete. Key factors: accuracy improvement delta, per-student cost viability, and API-based model management feasibility on Vertex AI.
